message:
feat(conformance): Add vecgen binary and test vector generation

Introduce the fcp-vecgen binary for generating and regenerating
conformance test vectors in CBOR format:

- Add vecgen module (src/vecgen/mod.rs) with vector generation logic
- Add binary entry point (src/bin/vecgen.rs) with clap CLI interface
- Add clap dependency with derive feature for argument parsing
- Update test vectors for enrollment and simulate request formats

The vecgen tool enables:
- Deterministic regeneration of CBOR test vectors
- Consistency checking between spec and implementation
- Easier maintenance of conformance test suites

Updated test vectors reflect current protocol schema requirements.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
